name: Priya Nair
title: Senior ML Engineer
summary: Experienced ML engineer specializing in NLP pipelines and transformer-based models. Led a team of 3 at a fintech startup building real-time fraud detection systems using BERT variants. Deployed models on AWS SageMaker.

name: Arjun Mehta
title: Data Scientist
summary: Data scientist with strong analytics background. Built recommendation systems for e-commerce platforms serving 2M users. Comfortable with end-to-end ML pipelines from data ingestion to model serving.

name: Sneha Rao
title: AI Research Engineer
summary: AI research engineer with publications in computer vision and RL. Worked on autonomous driving perception models at a top-tier research lab. Deep experience with GPU optimization and custom CUDA kernels.

name: Karthik Subramanian
title: MLOps Engineer
summary: MLOps specialist with 6 years building and maintaining production ML infrastructure. Set up model monitoring, retraining pipelines, and A/B testing frameworks for a large e-commerce company. Strong DevOps background.

name: Riya Desai
title: NLP Engineer
summary: NLP engineer passionate about large language models and RAG-based systems. Built a customer support chatbot using fine-tuned LLMs reducing ticket resolution time by 40%. Familiar with prompt engineering and LLM evaluation.

name: Vikram Singh
title: Senior Data Engineer
summary: Senior data engineer with expertise in building large-scale data pipelines. Designed a real-time data platform processing 10M events/day at a major bank. Strong background in distributed systems and data architecture.

name: Ananya Krishnan
title: Junior ML Engineer
summary: Recent graduate passionate about machine learning. Completed 2 internships building image classification and sentiment analysis models. Active Kaggle competitor with 2 silver medals. Looking for first full-time role.

name: Rohan Gupta
title: Computer Vision Engineer
summary: Computer vision engineer with end-to-end experience building and deploying vision models. Built defect detection system for a manufacturing client achieving 98% accuracy. Experience with model optimization for edge deployment.

name: Meera Pillai
title: Data Analyst
summary: Data analyst with strong business acumen. Created executive dashboards and automated reporting for a healthcare company saving 20 hours/week. Transitioning toward ML engineering with recent upskilling in Python and scikit-learn.

name: Aditya Sharma
title: Full Stack ML Engineer
summary: Full stack ML engineer who bridges model development and production deployment. Built and shipped 3 AI-powered SaaS products end-to-end. Comfortable owning the entire stack from data pipeline to user-facing API.

name: Divya Menon
title: NLP Research Scientist
summary: NLP research scientist with focus on large language model alignment and evaluation. 4 papers published at ACL and EMNLP. Previously at a leading AI lab working on instruction-tuned models. Deep expertise in RLHF and model evaluation frameworks.

name: Siddharth Joshi
title: Machine Learning Engineer
summary: ML engineer specializing in tabular data and structured prediction problems. Built credit scoring models for an NBFC achieving AUC of 0.91. Strong in feature engineering, model selection, and business-focused ML solutions.

name: Tanvi Shah
title: AI Product Manager
summary: AI product manager who has shipped 5 ML-powered features at a Series B startup. Bridges the gap between data science teams and business stakeholders. Strong understanding of ML lifecycle, model evaluation, and responsible AI.

name: Nikhil Verma
title: Deep Learning Engineer
summary: Deep learning engineer specializing in generative models. Built image generation and style transfer pipelines for a creative tech startup. Experience with diffusion models, fine-tuning Stable Diffusion, and deploying generative AI at scale.

name: Kavya Reddy
title: Data Science Lead
summary: Data science lead with 8 years of experience managing teams and delivering ML projects at scale. Led a team of 10 data scientists at a top MNC. Strong in translating business problems into ML solutions, stakeholder management, and building data-driven culture.
